flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Mount Mary University are 13% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($48.7k vs $55.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mount Mary University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (50.7% → 43.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mount Mary University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
